title: is_simple_space_prop + parse_simple_space_prop coupling not compile-enforced
description: Adding a new simple Space property requires updating is_simple_space_prop AND parse_simple_space_prop AND SimplePropPatch. The _ => arm in parse_simple_space_prop produces a runtime invalidPatch when this is missed — visible only in testing, not at compile time. The doc comment claims 'compile-time exhaustiveness check for free' which overstates: the exhaustiveness check is on the Phase 2 match (SimplePropPatch variants), not on the routing (is_simple_space_prop). A contributor who adds to is_simple_space_prop but not the enum will get a runtime error, not a compiler error.
